name: Cranberry Cookies with Orange Glaze
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Lightly grease a cookie sheet.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the granulated sugar and packed brown sugar.
4. Add butter, milk, orange juice, and egg to the dry ingredients. Stir until well combined.
5. Gradually add flour, baking soda, salt, and baking powder. Mix thoroughly.
6. Fold in the chopped cranberries and nuts.
7. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto the prepared cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 10 to 15 minutes or until lightly browned around the edges.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool on the cookie sheet.
10. To make the orange glaze, melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
11. Stir in powdered sugar and grated orange peel.
12. Add orange juice gradually, stirring until the mixture is thin enough to drizzle.
13. Drizzle the glaze over the cooled cookies.
